dead_code_fixed.issue: Dead ternary (if False) in validate.py strata merging

advisories.note: Char-level Jaccard dedup has low discriminative power — acceptable for this experiment's scale
Overlapping abbreviation/rewording transforms — handled by internal dedup check
Foreign language titles labeled as misspelling — labeling nit, doesn't affect functionality
variation_type not validated against allowed set — minor gap
Bookkeeper exact match case in manual.json — trivial but tests exact-match handling
LLM pass counts not enforced — LLM output is inherently variable
No retry/backoff on API calls — intentional per spec (fail-closed, no retry logic)
